title: Countach
synopsis: The day after he finds himself dumped by his girlfriend, Sorayama Shun recieves a letter... from himself? The letter was from Shun 25 years ago for his future self. The letter reminds him of the time when he dreamed of owning a Countach and being a successful professional racer. With loads of luck and his ambition to make his childhood dream come true, he finds himself as a new owner of an LP400 Countach.

synopsis: Astronomy and geology are fun…! Mira, who promised to “find an asteroid” with the boy she found at the campsite as a child. She tried to join the astronomy club, but from this year the “astronomy club” and the “geology research society” merged into the “earth sciences club”!? Let’s go search for the asteroid that we promised to look for that day. (Source: Manga Time Kirara Carat, translated)

title: Replica: Revenge of the Ex-Wife
titleNative: レプリカ 元妻の復讐
synopsis: Aoi grew up constantly being made fun of and bullied for her appearance. After going through one bad experience after the other in school, she finally gets to marry the man of her dreams who loves her for who she is. However, he too eventually seeks out someone better-looking and cheats on her, resulting in their divorce. Oddly enough though... the woman he cheated on Aoi with is the same girl who bullied her throughout their school years...! Now Aoi's on a mission to get revenge on the man who cheated on her who is now married to the woman who made her life miserable. She has her face reshaped, her name changed to Sumire, and slowly begins to find her way into their lives... (Source: MangaPlaza)
searchTerms: レプリカ 元妻の復讐

title: Maid-sama!
synopsis: As if being student council president of a predominantly male high school isn’t hard enough, Misaki Ayuzawa has a major secret—she works at a maid café after school! How is she supposed to keep her image of being ultrasmart, strong and overachieving intact once school heartthrob Takumi Usui discovers her double life?! title: Petals of Reincarnation
titleNative: リィンカーネーションの花弁
synonyms: มหาศึกวีรชนข้ามภพ
synopsis: Striving for talent, Senji Touya tries everything he can so he can find it. Kendou, dancing, swimming, basketball, soccer, chess,... anything he tries, he fails to exceed it. One day, his classmate, Haito, came to school for once in a long time. Senji refers her as someone who "has it" or someone who has talent. Later on, he found out that she isn't just someone who has talent, but someone who "took" the talent of herself in her past life. And, those who "took" the talent from their past lives, are also known as "Returners"…

title: Second Time in Another World, This Old Man Is WAY Stronger Than the High School Heroes!
titleRomaji: Isekai Nidome no Ossan, Dou Kangaete mo Koukousei Yuusha yori Tsuyoi
titleEnglish: Second Time in Another World, This Old Man Is WAY Stronger Than the High School Heroes!
titleNative: 異世界二度目のおっさん、どう考えても高校生勇者より強い
synonyms: The Old Man in His Second Time in Another World Is Somehow Stronger than the High School Hero
synopsis: Riku Takayanagi is a boring 32-year-old businessman with nothing special about him. Or so it seems. In truth, he once saved another world as a hero. Now he’s back in Japan, living a normal life… until one day, he’s dragged into the mess with three high school students and summoned again—this time to a different world?! Suddenly thrust into the unknown, Riku steadies the panicked teen heroes, encourages them, and teaches them how to survive. The long-awaited opening to a second-chance another-world adventure—starring a caring, absurdly overpowered old man hero! (Source: Alpha Manga)

title: Kagaku Chop
synopsis: Sai Suzuzono, chief of the Science Club, spends all of her time developing crazy experiments to satisfy her curiosity, like a real "mad scientist." The only one trying to contain her antics is Ren Nagakura, the class committee chairman; but Ren, despite being the class chairman, is also little clueless about other people (i.e. she's an idiot). And with Ren's involvement, Sai's weird experiments always turn out even weirder... Note: Includes 5 extra chapters.

title: Shy
synopsis: Earth was on the brink of a third World War when super-powered individuals came forth from each country around the globe, ending the conflict and ushering in a new era of relative peace. Among those heroes, Japan is represented by a timid young girl known as “Shy.” She may spend more time worrying about her own shortcomings than she does battling villains, but she’ll show the world that despite it all she still has the heart of a hero! (Source: Yen Press) Note: Nominated for the Tsugimanga 2020 Award in the Manga Category.
